_metadata.description: PatentOps Platform Risk Register — patent prosecution and platform operational risks

risks.description: Unauthorized user gains access to patent case data
risks.mitigation_strategy: JWT-based authentication with short expiry, RBAC enforcement on every API endpoint, audit logging of all access attempts
risks.residual_risk_justification: Residual risk limited to JWT token theft during valid session. Mitigated by short token expiry and session monitoring.
risks.kri_threshold: More than 5 unauthorized access attempts per hour from single IP

risks.description: Cross-tenant data leakage exposing confidential patent information, violating attorney-client privilege
risks.mitigation_strategy: PostgreSQL Row-Level Security policies, tenant_id mandatory on all tables, automated cross-tenant penetration test suite
risks.residual_risk_justification: RLS at database level provides defense-in-depth beyond application logic. Risk requires both application and database bypass.
risks.kri_threshold: Any cross-tenant query detected in test suite or audit log

risks.description: Unauthorized role performs restricted state transition (e.g., associate marks claim as FINAL, non-partner overrides conflict check)
risks.mitigation_strategy: State machine enforces role checks before transition, event store records actor_role on every transition, automated compliance scanning
risks.residual_risk_justification: State machine is the enforcement point, not a UI check. Bypass requires code-level compromise.
risks.kri_threshold: Any RBAC denial event for FINAL/FILED transitions

risks.description: Event store tampering or hash chain integrity compromise, undermining prosecution record reliability
risks.mitigation_strategy: Append-only event store with no UPDATE/DELETE permissions at database level, SHA-256 hash chain per case, periodic integrity verification job
risks.residual_risk_justification: Requires database superuser access to tamper. Periodic hash verification detects any compromise.

risks.description: Filed document altered after filing, creating inconsistency between stored and patent office version
risks.mitigation_strategy: Content hash recorded in event ledger at filing time, file storage uses immutable versioned files (new version = new file), periodic hash re-verification
risks.residual_risk_justification: Hash mismatch detection is automated. Storage immutability prevents casual alteration.
risks.kri_threshold: Any content hash mismatch detected during verification

risks.description: AI-generated content reaches filed status without human review, containing errors or hallucinations in patent claims or arguments
risks.mitigation_strategy: State machine requires human review checkpoint between AI_DRAFT and FILED states, all AI outputs watermarked, AI sidecar never writes to evidence ledger directly
risks.residual_risk_justification: Human may approve without thorough review. Mitigated by requiring reviewer/partner role (licensed professionals) for approval. KRI monitors acceptance rates.
risks.kri_threshold: AI draft acceptance rate exceeding 95% without modification (suggests rubber-stamping)

risks.description: Claim amendment history lost or incomplete, undermining prosecution history estoppel analysis and limiting ability to interpret patent scope
risks.mitigation_strategy: Every amendment emits CLAIM_AMENDED event with full diff, previous text, new text, and reason. Events are immutable. Version continuity enforced.
risks.residual_risk_justification: Event sourcing architecture guarantees completeness as long as events are properly emitted. Version gap detection catches any omissions.
risks.kri_threshold: Claim version gap detected (version N+2 without version N+1 event)

risks.description: Patent deadline missed, resulting in irrecoverable loss of patent rights (e.g., missed OA response deadline, missed maintenance fee)
risks.mitigation_strategy: Multi-level escalation system (30/14/7/3/1 day warnings), PM2 dedicated worker with cron restart, incident auto-creation on miss, multi-channel notification (dashboard + email + SMS)
risks.residual_risk_justification: Multiple redundant warning levels. Incident process ensures accountability. Worker health monitoring prevents silent failures.
risks.kri_threshold: Any deadline reaching escalation level 3 (3 days remaining) or any DEADLINE_MISSED event

risks.description: Conflict of interest not detected at intake, leading to representation of adverse parties and professional ethics violation
risks.mitigation_strategy: Automated conflict check at case INTAKE (mandatory gate), fuzzy name matching, cross-case party search, partner-level override with documented justification and ethical wall measures
risks.residual_risk_justification: Fuzzy matching may miss name variations across languages. Mitigated by periodic manual review of active case parties.
risks.kri_threshold: Any CONFLICT_OVERRIDE_APPROVED event (each requires manual review of justification)

risks.description: Failure to disclose known prior art (duty of candor / IDS obligation), resulting in patent unenforceability due to inequitable conduct
risks.mitigation_strategy: System tracks all known prior art references per case and warns when references exist without corresponding IDS filing. IDS completeness check before case closure.
risks.residual_risk_justification: System can only track references entered into the platform. References known to inventors but not disclosed to attorneys remain a risk — mitigated by inventor disclosure obligations in engagement agreements.
risks.kri_threshold: Case reaching CLOSED(granted) with unresolved IDS warnings, or IDS filed more than 3 months after reference added

risks.description: Patent family linkage error — incorrect or missing relationships between continuation, divisional, or CIP applications, leading to priority chain breaks
risks.mitigation_strategy: Bidirectional family link enforcement, priority date validation against parent filing dates, automated consistency checks
risks.residual_risk_justification: System enforces bidirectional links and date validation. Remaining risk is in initial data entry, mitigated by paralegal review.
risks.kri_threshold: Unidirectional family link detected, or priority date earlier than parent filing date

risks.description: Missed fee payment (filing fee, issue fee, maintenance fee, extension fee) resulting in patent abandonment or lapsed rights
risks.mitigation_strategy: Fee deadlines integrated into same escalation engine as prosecution deadlines, fee payment confirmation tracking, integration with payment systems planned for Phase 2
risks.residual_risk_justification: Fee deadlines use same proven escalation mechanism as OA deadlines. Payment confirmation currently manual (Phase 1) — automated verification in Phase 2.
risks.kri_threshold: Any fee deadline reaching escalation level 2 (7 days) or fee payment not confirmed within 48 hours of recorded payment
